title: Orizon Network - Cobblemon
description:
Adventure server — events, tournaments, raids, ranked battles, challenges, mega evolutions, teras, dynamax, Z-moves, and much more.

Spanish-speaking community.
body:
![Prof. cereza + Orizon Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7363bcf372625bc5fcd683c08778bc12e6943d1c.png)

[![Join us at discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59872913a88df89ec6a28965677d911d698ec456.png)](https://dsc.gg/orizon)

![anti pay2win community](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef985dfafac8e9731990921c7a476c622f9f82ce.png)

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb5f13159ca3d321388aa786c9aa22d027746a7f.png)

Download Orizon’s Official Modpack and join our Cobblemon server!

Dive into a unique adventure with No-Pay2Win monetization.

Explore custom biomes, uncover exclusive structures, and enjoy a world full of surprises.

You’ll never get bored here! Monthly Events and Tournaments, Raids, map-wide Trainers, the Cobblemon League, Cooperative Quests, and so much more.

A server made for true adventurers! If you love challenges, teamwork, and discovering new secrets, this is your place.

Join us in the Celestia Region!

Note: This is a Spanish-speaking community.

==================
